holdings.infoBox: GRNJ is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nebius Group stock at 2.08%, Carpenter Technology at 2.02%, MongoDB at 1.92%, SharkNinja at 1.88%, and e.l.f. Beauty at 1.87%.

overview.description: The fundstrat Granny Shots US Small - & Mid-Cap ETF (GRNJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in 20 to 100 US small- and mid-cap securities across 5 to 10 themes determined to likely impact the economy and stock market. GRNJ was launched on Nov 7, 2025 and is issued by Fundstrat.
